envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key — get from simmer.markets/dashboard (SDK tab).

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Your Polymarket wallet private key. Only needed for --venue polymarket --live with an external wallet. Not required for $SIM or managed wallets.

tunables.label: Venue — sim ($SIM, default) or polymarket (real USDC). Always validate on sim first.
Buy-only mode — 'true' accumulates positions only; 'false' fully rebalances (includes sells)
Minimum curated leaders required to trade — below this the run exits cleanly (degraded curation cache guard)
